query:
UPDATE topic
            SET started_at = COALESCE(
                (SELECT MIN(COALESCE(sent_at, created_at)) FROM message WHERE topic_id = $1),
                topic.started_at
            ),
            last_active_at = COALESCE(
                (SELECT MAX(COALESCE(sent_at, created_at)) FROM message WHERE topic_id = $1),
                topic.last_active_at
            )
            WHERE id = $1
